Use Case Benefit Profiles

Benefits vary by use case.
The ROI is always real.

Different use cases deliver different types of value to different stakeholders. Explore each to understand where Avatour creates the most impact for your organisation.

Look Use Case
Quality Audits & Supplier Inspections
Conduct full facility audits with your entire team of experts present remotely in 360° — and automatically generate a structured inspection report the moment the session ends.
⚡
Double your inspections.
Half the cost.
Eliminating travel time doubles your team's inspection capacity. Eliminating travel costs halves your programme budget.
Your Organisation (Auditor)
Cost savings on travel Time-to-report: hours not days More experts per audit Reduced audit program cost
Supplier / Site (Auditee)
Less operational disruption Less preparation overhead Faster corrective action loop
AI-Powered Reporting Advantage
Generate a complete inspection report — automatically.
Avatour's AI listens to the session, transcribes findings in real time, and pre-fills your inspection template — each finding linked directly to the exact 360° video frame that captured it.
✓ Audio transcription → structured findings
✓ Findings anchored to best visual evidence
✓ Draft report ready for review immediately after
✓ PDF export — no manual write-up required
Show Use Case
Sales Tours & Customer Showcases
Give prospects and customers an immersive walkthrough of your facilities, innovation centres, or manufacturing capabilities — without anyone needing to travel.
Your Organisation (Host / Seller)
Accelerate deal cycles New contract value won Stand out as innovator Expand addressable market
Customer / Prospect (Visitor)
Zero travel cost for evaluation Faster due diligence More evaluators per session Replay session for internal alignment
Measurable Sales KPIs
Track for New Customers
Total contract value of deals closed via Avatour sessions
Track for Existing Customers
CSAT per session + NPS trend over time
Track Engagement Quality
Session replays by customer = buying intent signal
Look Use Case · HSE
Health, Safety & Environmental Walks
Enable HSE teams, auditors, and regulators to conduct thorough safety reviews without exposing additional personnel to operational hazards.
HSE Team / Management
Reduced exposure liability Faster compliance reporting Consistent documentation standard
Site Workforce
Fewer visitors on hazardous floor Less disruption to operations Clear evidence trail for follow-up
⚠ Safety Multiplier Effect
Every additional person physically present on a hazardous site increases risk exposure. Avatour allows 10–20 experts to observe simultaneously — with zero additional physical presence required. The safety benefit compounds with the scale of participation.
Look Use Case · Ops
Gemba Walks & Continuous Improvement
Bring lean manufacturing experts, process engineers, and leadership to the floor — remotely — to identify waste, share best practices across facilities, and drive consistent operational improvement.
Operations / CI Teams
Eliminate multi-site travel costs More walks, same headcount Benchmarking across facilities
Site / Plant Teams
Less disruption to production Access to global expertise Recordable for team review
Factory Performance & Reliability Leader · Global CPG Company
"The time Avatour has saved us in travel and meetings has been great… less travel and less change of the plant production schedule means a more efficient production trial for our team."
Show Use Case · L&D
Remote Training & Onboarding
Train employees, contractors, or customers on physical sites without requiring everyone to travel. Record sessions for asynchronous learning — reviewed whenever needed.
L&D / Training Teams
Scale training without travel Reuse recorded sessions Consistent global standard
Trainees / New Employees
Site familiarisation before arrival Improved work-life balance Access to remote / specialist sites
Talent Attraction Angle
Show applicants their future workplace — virtually — during the recruitment process. A powerful differentiator for attracting top talent, especially for roles at remote, industrial, or specialist sites.
Look Use Case · Projects
Project Progress Control
Keep all project stakeholders aligned on construction or installation progress — without requiring repeated site visits. Whether it's a new facility being built, a production line being installed, or a major site modification, Avatour gives every decision-maker direct visual access to the current state of the project in 360°.
Client / Owner Team
Better joint decisions with full visual context Faster sign-off — no waiting for next site visit Reduced project delays from communication gaps Travel savings across repeated milestone reviews Fewer personnel on active construction sites
Contractor / Site Team
Permanent visual record of each milestone Reduced disruption from client visits Transparent progress builds client confidence
Engineering Consultants · Senior Management · Regulators
Join any session remotely — no travel required Decisions made with the same visual context as on-site
AI-Generated Punch Lists & Snag Reports
Progress inspections generate findings — deviations, open items, snags. Avatour's AI transcribes these in real time and pre-fills a structured report, with each finding linked to the exact 360° video frame that documented it.
✓ Live transcription of identified issues
✓ Findings anchored to 360° video timestamps
✓ Structured punch list / snag report — PDF export
✓ Immutable visual evidence trail for sign-off disputes
Also applicable: FAT & SAT
Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) and Site Acceptance Tests (SAT) follow the same pattern — a formal inspection of equipment or installation against a specification. Avatour enables the client's acceptance team to participate fully and remotely, with AI-assisted documentation of every finding against the test protocol.
────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
Quantifiable Value Dimensions

Six categories of
measurable business value

Avatour's ROI spans financial, operational, and strategic dimensions. Each is tracked within the platform's analytics dashboard.

Travel Cost Savings
Calculated per session based on participant geolocation and site distance. Includes flights, accommodation, and per diem. Business class applied for intercontinental routes.
Measured as
$ saved per session / per year
Example
$78,876 for 12 US–Thailand participants
Productive Time Recovered
Travel time eliminated is converted to financial value using participant day-rates. Intercontinental trips can consume 2–4 days of productive time per person.
Measured as
Hours saved × daily rate
Tracked in-platform
Aggregated by site, team, period
Carbon Emissions Avoided
Calculated in tonnes CO₂ and equivalent trees saved. Feeds directly into ESG and sustainability reporting — a growing requirement from enterprise procurement teams.
Measured as
Tonnes CO₂ avoided / trees equivalent
Example
64,070 lbs (1 session, 12 participants)
Sales & Revenue Uplift
For commercial show use cases. Track contracts influenced or won through Avatour-enabled customer engagements, and measure retention improvements via CSAT and NPS.
New Business
TCV of contracts won via Avatour
Retention
CSAT per session · NPS trend
Decision Quality & Speed
More experts can participate simultaneously in each session — increasing the quality of findings, reducing rework cycles, and accelerating time-to-decision across inspection and improvement workflows.
Measured as
Participants per session · Rework cycles reduced
Value driver
Faster corrective action → lower quality cost
AI-Powered Reporting Efficiency
Inspectors typically spend as long writing the report as they spent on the inspection itself — often a full day of writing for a one-hour site visit. Avatour's AI reduces that to minutes.
Typical without Avatour
1 hour inspection → ~1 day of report writing
With Avatour AI
1 hour inspection → ~1 hour to finalise report
✦ New Capability

From session to
report in minutes.

Inspectors typically spend as long writing up findings as they spent on the inspection itself — often a full day of work for a one-hour site visit. Nobody enjoys it, and it delays corrective action. Avatour's AI does the heavy lifting: transcribing findings in real time, pre-filling your report template, and linking every item to its 360° video evidence. Typically, what used to take a day now takes about an hour.

Live audio transcription
AI-structured inspection template
Findings linked to 360° video timestamps
PDF report — no manual write-up
Human review & edit before finalising
Customer Proof Point
Global CPG Customer: $78K saved in a single session
In January 2022, a leading global CPG company invited 16 people to run a comprehensive review of a facility in Thailand — 12 of whom joined virtually from the US. What began as a pandemic solution became a permanent operational strategy.
$78K
Total cost saved (flights, lodging, meals)
350hrs
Travel time recovered (flights alone)
64K lbs
CO₂ emissions avoided
1 session
16 participants · global coverage
"The time Avatour has saved us in travel and meetings has been great… less travel and less change of the plant production schedule means a more efficient production trial for our team."
Factory Performance & Reliability Leader · Global CPG Company
By Stakeholder

The right benefit,
for the right audience

Different people experience Avatour's value differently. Here's how the business case lands across key organisational roles.

CFO / Finance
Cost & ROI Focus
Quantifiable travel cost reduction per session and annually
Financial
Platform cost vs. travel budget comparison
Financial
ESG / carbon cost avoidance for reporting
Compliance
Built-in ROI tracking dashboard
Operational

Faster audit cycles with more experts per session
Efficiency
AI-generated reports with 360° evidence trail
Quality
Consistent inspection standards across sites
Compliance
Recorded sessions for traceability and training
Documentation

Revenue & Customer Focus
Differentiate through innovative customer experience
Strategic
Remove travel barriers to win global deals
Revenue
Track CSAT and NPS per engagement
CX
Replays enable asynchronous buyer alignment
Enablement
HSE / Safety
Risk & Compliance Focus
Reduce headcount exposure on hazardous sites
Safety
Include more safety experts per walkthrough
Quality
Auto-generated, evidence-backed safety reports
Compliance

Traceability

Environmental
Feeds ESG / Scope 3 emissions reporting
Reporting
Demonstrate green commitment to customers
Brand
Trees equivalent metric for communications
Comms
Employee / Participant
Personal & Wellbeing Focus
Improved work-life balance — less time in transit
Wellbeing
Access world-class sites without travel burden
Access
Contribute expertise across more sessions
Impact
Attractive use of technology for talent retention
Retention
Beyond the Spreadsheet

Strategic & soft benefits
that compound over time

Not every benefit shows up immediately in a P&L. These advantages grow in value the longer Avatour is embedded in your operations.

Global Site Visibility
Give any site — however remote — the same visibility as your flagship facility. Overcome geography as a constraint on decision-making and oversight.
Replayable Institutional Knowledge
Every recorded session becomes a permanent, searchable reference. Review critical decisions, onboard new team members, and prevent knowledge loss when people leave.
Innovation Brand Signal
Using Avatour signals to customers, partners, and talent that your organisation embraces forward-thinking technology — a differentiator in competitive markets.
Reduced Operational Disruption
Virtual visitors reduce interference with live production schedules, minimise safety briefing overhead, and allow sites to maintain throughput during reviews.
Better Talent Attraction
Show candidates their future workplace virtually during recruitment. Particularly effective for remote, industrial, or specialist sites that are hard to visit.
Improved Work-Life Balance
Eliminating international travel improves wellbeing for employees and customer-side participants alike — a benefit that correlates with retention and engagement.
Reduced Safety Exposure
Hazardous facilities can be reviewed comprehensively by large expert teams — with zero additional physical presence and zero incremental risk.
Deeper Stakeholder Inclusion
Remove the participation bottleneck. Invite every relevant expert to every session, regardless of location — increasing both buy-in and the quality of outcomes.
Strategic Positioning

Three pillars of
long-term competitive advantage

Superior Customer Experience
Elevate every customer touchpoint that involves a physical site — from initial qualification tours to ongoing account reviews.
  • Immersive virtual facility tours at zero cost to the buyer
  • Contract manufacturing pitches with real-time Q&A
  • Ongoing relationship sessions without travel friction
  • CSAT and NPS tracking built into every session
Operational Excellence at Scale
Apply best practices from your best sites to all sites — systematically — without flying experts around the world.
  • Cross-facility Gemba programmes without travel budget
  • Centralised quality oversight across global supply chains
  • AI-powered documentation at every inspection
  • Standardised reporting for regulatory compliance
Employer Brand & Talent Edge
Signal to the market that your organisation operates at the frontier of enterprise technology — and attract the talent that wants to work there.
  • Virtual office and facility tours during hiring process
  • Demonstrates commitment to work-life balance
  • Tangible ESG contribution for sustainability-focused hires
  • Technology-forward brand signal in competitive markets

See the ROI for
your organisation.

Book a 30-minute session and we'll walk you through your facility in 360° — and show you exactly what your team stands to save.
